mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO kol_tag_attribute_relation ( id, tag_id, tag_name, platform_type, tag_type, video_url, attribute_id, attribute_type_id, attribute_name, attribute_type_name, sort_code, is_delete, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, level, product_id ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.tagId}, #{item.tagName}, #{item.platformType}, #{item.tagType}, #{item.videoUrl}, #{item.attributeId}, #{item.attributeTypeId}, #{item.attributeName}, #{item.attributeTypeName}, #{item.sortCode}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.level}, #{item.productId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT tag_id, attribute_type_id FROM kol_tag_attribute_relation WHERE is_delete = 0 and tag_id in(
#{item} ) GROUP BY tag_id, attribute_type_id

SELECT cc.tag_id, cc.LEVEL, cc.attribute_id, cc.attribute_name, cc.attribute_type_id, sub_c.attribute_en_name, p.brand_id, p.brand_name, p.id as product_id, p.product_name FROM kol_tag_attribute_relation cc left join kol_product p ON cc.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN kol_attribute sub_c ON cc.attribute_id = sub_c.id WHERE cc.is_delete = 0 AND cc.tag_id IN (
#{item} )
